arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ أَوَّلَ ظَالِمٍ ظَلَمَ حَقَّ مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
english translation text:
Allāhum al-ʿan awwala ẓālimin ẓalama ḥaqqa Muḥammadin wa āli Muḥammad
O Allāh, curse the first to oppress Muḥammad and Muḥammad’s household,

wa ākhira tābiʿin lahu ʿalā dhālik.
And the next who followed him in that.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ الْعَنِ الْعِصَابَةَ الَّتِي جَاهَدَتِ الْحُسَيْنَ
english translation text:
Allāhum al-ʿan il-ʿiṣābat al-latī jāhadat il-Ḥusayni
O Allāh, curse the band who fought against Ḥusayn,

wa shāyaʿat wa bāyaʿat wa tābaʿat ʿalā qatlih.
Who came together, made a pact, and participated in his murder,

Allāhum alʿanhum jamīʿā.
O Allāh, curse all of them.
